nasb.text: Then Horam king of Gezer came up to help Lachish, and Joshua defeated him and his people until he had left him no survivor.

esv.text: Then Horam king of Gezer came up to help Lachish. And Joshua struck him and his people, until he left none remaining.

cnv.text: 那時，基色王荷蘭上來幫助拉吉，約書亞就把他和他的人民都擊殺了，沒有留下一人。

ccb.text: 基色王何兰前来支持拉吉，结果也被约书亚杀得一个不剩。
